bugs.description: transitioning state stuck true when paywall is pushed from loadNextVerse — all swipes and save button permanently disabled on return
reproductionSteps: Hit free tier limit (10/day)
Swipe on message screen — triggers loadNextVerse
Paywall appears, user taps Not Now
Return to message screen — card is frozen, nothing responds to swipe
bugs.resolution: Reset transitioning to false before router.push('/paywall') in loadNextVerse

bugs.description: Save/discard swipe indicator badges on wrong sides — Save badge was left-anchored, Discard badge was right-anchored (opposite of Tinder-style convention)
reproductionSteps: Open any message
Drag card to the right (save direction)
Save indicator appears on left side instead of right
bugs.resolution: Swapped: Save badge to right:24, Discard badge to left:24

bugs.description: transformOrigin CSS property used in envelope fold creases — not supported in React Native, silently ignored on iOS/Android
reproductionSteps: Open envelope screen on a real device
Fold crease lines don't rotate from their corners as intended
bugs.resolution: Removed transformOrigin properties from both fold crease Views

bugs.description: No escape UI on envelope screen when performCheckIn throws and result stays null — screen shows loading state indefinitely
reproductionSteps: Simulate a network or storage error in performCheckIn
Envelope screen shows indefinitely with no way to exit
bugs.resolution: Added error state render: when !loading && !result, show error message with Go home button

bugs.description: Duplicate FREE_CHECKINS_PER_DAY constant: src/constants/index.ts was updated to 10 but src/constants/theme.ts LIMITS still had value 3
reproductionSteps: Import LIMITS from theme.ts
LIMITS.FREE_CHECKINS_PER_DAY returns 3 instead of 10

bugs.description: Duplicate 'fetch' entry in UIBackgroundModes in app.json — results in redundant plist entry
reproductionSteps: Open app.json, inspect ios.infoPlist.UIBackgroundModes
Array contains ['fetch', 'fetch']
bugs.resolution: Removed duplicate entry, array is now ['fetch']

bugs.description: Double-splash race: _layout.tsx held React tree as null for 1800ms while splash.tsx also ran its own 1800ms animation — independent timers on different clocks caused a blank-then-splash flicker
reproductionSteps: Cold-launch the app
Native splash holds, then briefly black before in-app splash appears
bugs.resolution: Reduced minDelayDone timer in _layout.tsx from 1800ms to 200ms so splash.tsx owns all branded splash timing

bugs.description: Unused Dimensions import in onboarding.tsx — const { width } declared but never referenced
reproductionSteps: TypeScript strict mode — unused variable warning
bugs.resolution: Removed Dimensions from import and removed the const { width } declaration

bugs.description: emotions.tsx used router.replace('/paywall') — pressing back from paywall would exit the app instead of returning to the emotion picker
reproductionSteps: Hit the free tier limit
Tap any emotion — paywall appears
Tap back/Not Now — app exits or goes to home instead of emotions screen
bugs.resolution: Changed to router.push('/paywall') so back navigation returns to emotion picker
